mva.explanation: MVA eigenvalue ratio λ_int/λ_min = 13.38. Reliable normal direction.

bz_status.label: Strongly northward
bz_status.explanation: Bz = +6.8 nT — very low geomagnetic activity expected.

axes.y: Particle energy [eV] — log scale, 20 keV (bottom) → 6 MeV/n (top)
axes.color: log₁₀ differential flux [p cm⁻² s⁻¹ sr⁻¹ eV⁻¹]

psd.interpretation: Spectral index α = -0.63. Kolmogorov MHD turbulence predicts −1.67. Shallower than −5/3 → energy injection (shock, CME).

explanations.beta: β = 0.096 — Magnetically dominated. Alfvén waves govern dynamics.
explanations.alfven: V_A = 126.4 km/s — Alfvén wave speed along field lines.
explanations.mach_a: M_A = 3.81 — flow/Alfvén speed. Super-Alfvénic — bow shock forms at Earth.
explanations.mach_s: M_s = 4675318876460.29 — flow/sound speed. Supersonic — shocks can form.

events.explanation: β = 0.096 ≪ 1 — magnetic pressure dominates. Typical of CME flux rope interiors. Alfvén wave propagation dominates plasma dynamics in this regime.
